summary: Added depth-of-field bokeh effect to all 7 point-based shader systems. Vertex shaders compute circle-of-confusion (CoC) from depth vs uFocusDistance, scale point size for foreground bokeh (3x) and slight background increase (0.5x), and pass vCoC varying to fragment shaders. Fragment shaders use vCoC to soften edge falloff and reduce alpha for out-of-focus particles. Focus distance modulates subtly over time (~31s period, ±0.5 units). Quality tiers control dofStrength: 0 (low/disabled), 0.4 (medium), 0.6 (high). Upper point size clamps raised to 96.0 (standard) and 20.0 (terrain) to allow bokeh bloom. All 2008 tests pass, build succeeds.
